Class SimplePropertyExpression<F,T>

java.lang.Object
ch.njol.skript.lang.util.SimpleExpression<T>
ch.njol.skript.expressions.base.PropertyExpression<F,T>
ch.njol.skript.expressions.base.SimplePropertyExpression<F,T>
com.shanebeestudios.skbee.api.skript.base.SimplePropertyExpression<F,T>
Type Parameters:
F - From type
T - To type
All Implemented Interfaces:
Debuggable, Expression<T>, Loopable<T>, Simplifiable<Expression<? extends T>>, SyntaxElement, SyntaxRuntimeErrorProducer, Converter<F,T>, RuntimeErrorProducer, SyntaxRuntimeErrorProducer
public abstract class SimplePropertyExpression<F,T> extends ch.njol.skript.expressions.base.SimplePropertyExpression<F,T> implements SyntaxRuntimeErrorProducer
Extension of Skript's SimplePropertyExpression which implements SyntaxRuntimeErrorProducer
